challenge.title: Korak 11
challenge.description:
Svaki put kada se kod izvršava, trebalo bi da vidite neočekivano slovo iz sekvence karaktera od all_characters. Ovo je upravo ono što želite postići kreiranjem nepredvidljive lozinke.

Međutim, algoritam koji zavisi od random čini nasumične brojeve nepredvidivim. Stoga, iako je modul random pogodan za mnoge obične aplikacije, ne može se koristiti za svrhe šifrovanja, zbog njegove predvidive prirode.

Umesto uvoza random, import modula za secrets. Zatim promenite poziv print() ili koristite secrets.choice(all_characters).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import random
import string


# Define the possible characters for the password
letters = string.ascii_letters
digits = string.digits
symbols = string.punctuation

# Combine all characters
all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

print(all_characters)
print(random.choice(all_characters))

tests.text: Trebalo bi da uvezete modul secrets umesto modula random.
Trebalo bi da promeniš svoj poziv print() ili odštampaš secrets.choice(all_characters).

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length=16, nums=1, special_chars=1, uppercase=1, lowercase=1):

    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
        
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (special_chars, fr'[{symbols}]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]')
        ]

        # Check constraints
        if all(
            constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password))
            for constraint, pattern in constraints
        ):            
            break
    
    return password
    

if __name__ == '__main__':
    new_password = generate_password()
    print('Generated password:', new_password)
